jobs.purpose: GDPR retention path. Soft-delete geofence_checks rows past the tenant's retention window (default 7 years). Hard-delete rows past the anonymisation window (10 years).
steps: Soft-delete rows WHERE created_at < now() - retention_years
Fire GeofenceCheckDeleted for each deleted row.
For rows soft-deleted > 3 years ago: hard-delete after nullifying subject_id (anonymisation).
jobs.notes: Weekly. Small batches (1000 rows at a time) to avoid long transactions on the audit table.

jobs.purpose: Sanity check: no geofence_checks row has been modified since insert. Compares audit-log entries against the audit_include column list; any drift raises a critical alert.
jobs.notes: Runs hourly. Cheap query — groups by check_id + counts audit events. Anything > 1 event = mutation attempted.
